about.heading: Travel should feel like home.
about.body: Travolish was founded with a simple belief: every journey deserves a stay worth remembering. We connect travellers with handpicked hotels, boutique guesthouses, and unique stays that match how they actually travel — not just where they're going.
about.mission: To make exceptional stays accessible to every traveller — not just the ones who know where to look.
about.ctaDesc: Browse thousands of handpicked stays across India and beyond.

emergency.title: Guest safety and SOS.
emergency.desc: Traveller-side emergency contacts, active-stay safety details, and one-touch support UI.
emergency.tripSafetyDesc: Relevant safety details will follow the traveller's active booking.
emergency.hostContactsNote: Host and property contacts appear here during an active stay.

checklist.one: Share your booking ID and current location.
checklist.two: Contact the property host through messages if it is safe.
checklist.three: Use local emergency services first for immediate danger.
